title: alchemilla alpina proles subsericea
intro: Alchemilla alpina proles subsericea, also known as Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a subspecies of the Alchemilla alpina plant, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla alpina proles subsericea include its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, as well as its potential to help with menstrual cramps and other female health issues. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla alpina proles subsericea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the leaves and flowers of the plant.
